LanguageData.MapPreview.Title: Map Preview
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableMapPreviewInEn: ... while starting a new game (choosing the tile to settle on)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableMapPreviewInPl: ... while playing (on the world map screen)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableToolbarInEntry: ... while starting a new game (choosing the tile to settle on)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableToolbarInPlay: ... while playing (on the world map screen)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.AutoOpenPreviewOnWor: Automatically open preview window when switching to the world map
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.TriggerPreviewOnWorl: Show map preview when a settlement or quest site is selected
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableSeedRerollFeat: Show map seed reroll button (not available because Map Reroll mod is installed)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableSeedRerollWind: Use reroll helper window (hold shift when clicking reroll button to invert)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.IncludeCaves: Include caves in preview (disable to make preview generation faster)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.EnableTrueTerrainCol: Use true terrain colors (enables support for terrain added by mods, also applies to Map Reroll)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.SkipRiverFlowCalc: Use river generator optimization (faster, but slightly different from vanilla)
LanguageData.MapPreview.Settings.CompatibilityMode: Compatibility mode (increases memory usage, but can help if you have mod compatibility issues)
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.WaitForPreview: There is a map preview currently generating, please wait before continuing...
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.RerollMapSeed: Reroll the seed for this map.
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.ResetMapSeed: Undo rerolls and reset the seed for this map to the original one.
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.RerollWorldSeed: Generate a new world with a random seed.
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.RerollWindow.Title: Reroll Map Seed
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.RerollWindow.GoTo.Label: Enter number of rerolls:
LanguageData.MapPreview.World.RerollWindow.GoTo.Inval: Invalid number, only digits and + are allowed.
LanguageData.MapPreview.PreviewGenerationFailed: A conflict with one of your mods has caused the map preview generator to fail. Please report this on the Map Preview workshop page so that a compatibility patch can be created. After closing this message, please upload your log file and include that link in your bug report.
LanguageData.MapPreview.Integration.MapDesigner.Unava: Map Designer can not be used on this tile.
LanguageData.HugsLogPublisher.shareConfirmMessage:
Upload game logs now?

This will post your game logs to a public server and give you the link to share with others. This is useful if you need help fixing a problem or would like to report an issue to a mod author.

No private information will be shared.
LanguageData.HugsLogPublisher.shortUrls_tip: Produces a shorter link when uploading. Not recommended on Steam- short links are automatically removed.
LanguageData.HugsLogPublisher.platformInfo_tip: Includes information about your CPU, memory and video card in the log.
LanguageData.HugsLogPublisher.unlimitedLogSize_tip: When disabled, log size is limited to 10K lines to prevent very long logs from causing issues.
